category_sources: source_facts.description says reposurgeon edits version-control repository history.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official reposurgeon project page and documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://gitlab.com/esr/reposurgeon, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
